description:
The TrailLifetimeConstantInitializer component gives trails in a particle system a constant starting Lifetime when born.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Value: The starting Lifetime all trails in a particle system should have.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
